message:
feat(tools,conformance): align 34 tool descriptions with Python reference and add parity tests

Tools crate — update all 34 MCP tool descriptions to match the Python
reference implementation word-for-word:
- lib.rs (+523 lines): centralize tool description constants and
  registration with descriptions matching Python server exactly
- contacts.rs: update contact management tool descriptions
- macros.rs: update macro tool descriptions (start_session,
  prepare_thread, file_reservation_cycle, contact_handshake)
- messaging.rs: update messaging tool descriptions (send, reply,
  fetch_inbox, mark_read, acknowledge, search)
- products.rs: update product management tool descriptions
- reservations.rs: update file reservation tool descriptions

Conformance and parity tests:
- tool_description_parity.rs: conformance test that loads Python
  reference descriptions and asserts exact match against Rust tool
  registration output
- agent_name_parity.rs: new test validating agent name validation
  rules match between Python and Rust implementations
- contact_policy_parity.rs: new test validating contact policy
  semantics (open, auto, contacts_only, block_all) match between
  implementations

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
